claim_ceiling: accepted isolated typed Yahoo configuration, frozen call plan, strict Decimal parser, and mocked single-call adapter only; no persisted raw or normalized data, live-source readiness, Staging run, schedule, strategy, Production, or release claim
negative_controls: HTTP cannot execute without a content-addressed frozen scope and call plan
wrong source, adapter, identity, date window, or attempt ceiling fails validation
malformed, duplicate-key, non-finite, error-envelope, zero-result, or multiple-result JSON fails closed
wrong symbol, currency, instrument type, exchange, timezone, GMT offset, or session timestamp fails closed
null, binary-float, nonintegral, negative, nonpositive, unequal-length, or inconsistent OHLCV fails closed
adjusted close remains reconciliation-only and factor-invisible
HTTP status and non-JSON content type fail before normalization
no source registration, default client, retry loop, persistence, Dagster definition, release activation, or Production binding exists
